prompt: What is the student-to-professor ratio per department?

inputData.question: What is the student-to-professor ratio per department?

{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What is the student-to-professor ratio per department?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What is the student-to-professor ratio per department?"},"startedAt":1771855806258,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks for the student-to-professor ratio per department. I have confirmed the schema structure:
- students table has department_id and can be counted per department
- professors table has department_id and can be counted per department
- departments table has id, code, and name for department identification

The query will:
1. Join students and professors to departments
2. Count students and professors per department
3. Calculate the ratio (student_count / professor_count)
4. Order by department name for deterministic output
5. Use explicit column aliases matching the analysis intent","sql":"SELECT 
  d.code AS department_code,
  d.name AS department_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS student_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS professor_count,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT s.id)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT p.id), 0), 2) AS student_to_professor_ratio
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN students s ON d.id = s.department_id
LEFT JOIN professors p ON d.id = p.department_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name
ORDER BY d.name ASC","assumptions":["Assumes each student and professor belongs to exactly one department","Uses NULLIF to handle departments with no professors (avoiding division by zero)","Counts distinct IDs to ensure accurate counts even if there are duplicate rows from joins","LEFT JOINs preserve all departments even if they have no students or professors"]},"endedAt":1771855835496},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT

FROM departments d

LEFT JOIN professors p ON d.id = p.department_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name
ORDER BY d.name ASC"},"startedAt":1771855835502,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  d.code AS department_code,
  d.name AS department_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS student_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS professor_count,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT s.id)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT p.id), 0), 2) AS student_to_professor_ratio
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN students s ON d.id = s.department_id
LEFT JOIN professors p ON d.id = p.department_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name
ORDER BY d.name ASC

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

SELECT 
  d.code AS department_code,
  d.name AS department_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS student_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS professor_count,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT s.id)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT p.id), 0), 2) AS student_to_professor_ratio
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN students s ON d.id = s.department_id
LEFT JOIN professors p ON d.id = p.department_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name
ORDER BY d.name ASC
